name: Dr. D. Houser
positioning: Accessible, family-friendly orthodontic care focused on creating positive, stress-free experiences for kids while giving parents clarity, confidence, and practical guidance. A calm and supportive practice where every family feels welcome and at ease.
messagingBehavior: Leads with gentle care, parent reassurance, and a stress-free experience for kids. Balances child comfort with clear, simple guidance for parents. Warm and approachable without being childish. Practical and supportive — never clinical, urgent, or luxury-forward.
patientBase: Family-focused households seeking a friendly and affordable orthodontic experience
Parents who value reassurance and a low-stress environment
Families prioritizing early orthodontic evaluation and flexible payment options
layout: Color-forward with clear sections parents can scan
Fun visual accents balanced with readable information
donts: Anything intimidating for children or anxious parents
